The '''Government House''' was the official residence of the [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. A towering, palatial building located at the heart of [[Government Circle]], the federal district of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Worlport/Legends|Worlport]], Government House was designed with the [[Corellian classic-revival]] architectural style in mind. The [[Ord Mantell Central Authority|central government]] of the planet operated within and around the Government House to ensure the smooth flow of political agendas. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], the [[Conclave on the Plight of the Refugees]] was hosted at the Government House.
